_README: Copy this file to ~/.claude/mcp.json and uncomment only the servers you want to wire up.
Each server requires credentials in environment variables — see docs/mcp-setup.md.
After saving, restart Claude Code. The agents will detect available MCP tools automatically
and prefer them over public WebFetch / scraping.

_notion._note: Notion — for adgent-copywriter (brand voice), adgent-content-creator (calendar), adgent-project-manager (docs)

_linear._note: Linear — for adgent-project-manager (tasks). Replace _linear with linear when ready.

_figma._note: Figma — for adgent-art-director (brand kit), adgent-copywriter (visual context), adgent-dtp-operator (export sizes)

_google_drive._note: Google Drive — for adgent-art-director, adgent-copywriter, adgent-project-manager (client folders)

_meta_ads_library._note: Meta Ad Library — for adgent-market-researcher and adgent-media-buyer (competitor ad analysis). Requires custom MCP — see docs/mcp-setup.md for build instructions.

_ga4._note: GA4 Data API — for adgent-data-analyst (read-only metrics). Requires custom MCP — see docs/mcp-setup.md.

_higgsfield._note: Higgsfield API — for adgent-art-director, adgent-ai-prompter (image gen). Custom MCP.

_brand_monitoring._note: Brand24 or Mention API — for adgent-community-manager and adgent-market-researcher. Custom MCP.
